headlines.title: Trump says the U.S. will work with Iran to destroy its uranium if they can make a deal
headlines.description: The president offered detailed remarks about the status of negotiations to end the war with Iran and its impact on the economy.

headlines.title: AI’s elite celebrated in Washington as the public sours on data centers and chatbots
Candace Owens and the Tate brothers turned up in Russia. The Kremlin spun it as a thaw.
headlines.description: Their appearance comes amid battlefield setbacks and dropping public sentiment in Russia.

headlines.title: Nashville Zoo tries to halt data center project next door over animal safety concerns
headlines.description: The zoo this week launched an online petition against the data center that, as of Friday, had more than 180,000 signatures and 25,000 shares on Facebook.

headlines.title: Utah residents sue officials over Kevin O’Leary data center plan
headlines.description: A nonprofit and five Utah residents have filed a lawsuit against officials and a special entity overseeing Kevin O’Leary’s planned Stratos data center.

headlines.title: Illinois Gov. JB Pritzker to suspend tax breaks offered to data centers
headlines.description: Pritzker, who is widely viewed as having 2028 White House aspirations, is tapping into an issue seen as important to voters.

headlines.title: Bot web traffic has overtaken human web traffic, data shows
headlines.description: Cloudflare says 57.4% of requests to a selection of websites it hosts are now automated bot requests, while 42.6% are human-generated.

headlines.title: Israel strikes Iranian military targets hours after Tehran launched its own attacks
headlines.description: Israel's military said that it struck Iranian military targets in the western and central parts of the country. NBC News' Courtney Kube reports.

headlines.title: Why ceasefires haven’t stopped deadly strikes in Gaza, Lebanon or the Gulf
headlines.description: Across the Middle East, three separate ceasefire deals are in effect.

headlines.title: Trump on new Fed Chair Warsh: ‘I don’t want to have a big influence on him’
headlines.description: In an exclusive interview with Meet the Press, President Trump addresses the economy amid the war with Iran and says Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh is “fantastic,” adding, “I want him to do whatever he wants” when it comes to setting interest rates.

headlines.title: How the FBI and law enforcement plan to deploy drones to keep FIFA World Cup games safe
headlines.description: The FBI prepares to tackle drone security ahead of FIFA World Cup games spanning across the country. NBC News' Kelly O’Donnell goes behind the scenes with the FBI to see how its own drones and partnerships with local law enforcement will keep the events safe.

headlines.title: Anthropic Warns AI May Soon Be Able to Improve Itself
headlines.description: Artificial intelligence company Anthropic is calling for a global slowdown of AI development, saying the systems are advancing so fast, they may soon be able to improve themselves without any human input. Anthropic co-founder Jack Clark says it’s important that people keep control over AI systems as they get more powerful and have a broader impact on society.
